teaParties.name: Classic Tea Party
includes: Choice of tea from our full menu
Freshly baked scones with clotted cream & jam

teaParties.name: Grand Tea Party
includes: Keepsake tea tin to take home

teaParties.name: Children's Tea Party
includes: Caffeine-free herbal tea or hot cocoa

events.name: Spring Tea Tasting
events.description: Sample the season's first-flush Darjeelings and Japanese Shinchas alongside light bites. Learn what makes spring teas so special.

events.name: Watercolour & Tea Workshop
events.description: Paint a botanical watercolour while sipping curated teas. All materials provided. No experience needed — just bring your curiosity.

events.name: Evening Chai Experience
events.description: An immersive evening exploring the world of chai — from classic masala to Kashmiri noon chai. Includes tastings, spice blending, and a take-home blend.

events.name: Mother's Day Grand Tea
events.description: Treat Mum to a special afternoon tea with champagne, a full service, and a gift bag to take home. Reservations required.

events.name: Pu-erh Deep Dive
events.description: Explore the world of aged and fermented teas. Taste sheng vs. shou, learn about aging, and discover why collectors prize these cakes.
